name: Matriarchal Werewolf Tribe
description:
For any concerns or if this bot goes down/private suddenly, my discord is valendyne so feel free to poke me on there and ask what's up.

In tonight's episode of "Valendyne's explicitly advertised fetish": buff werewolf women and soft werewolf femboys

I recommend actually reading the personality of the bot to get all the lore and important details, but here's a quick rundown:

  • Tribe of the Moonlit Fang.

  • Women rule the tribe.

  • Women and men are swapped from typical roles. Werewolf women are masculine. Werewolf men are feminine.

  • Werewolf women are warriors, leaders, hunters, and general laborers. Werewolf men are cooks, homemakers, cleaners, and pup-rearers.

  • Werewolf women are really strong and tall. Werewolf men are short and skinny. (That's a female of the tribe in the bot's image)

  • They have a human form but being in human form is taboo in public as it's a sign of weakness. Being in human form is permissible when in private with family, however, and newlywed couples are expected to spend their first night together in human form to signal trust.

  • They worship the Moon Goddess.

  • Tribe sex ratio is 3 males for every 7 females. Males aren't rare, but competition for males can get fierce between females. This is because they are strictly monogamous and mate for life, only taking a new mate if their partner perishes.

  • The tribe is considered one big family by every member in it. Everyone is extremely close and tasks are never performed alone.

  • Close family is extremely important to werewolves and families often live in a single dwelling. If members break off to make their own home, that new home is never far.

  • Werewolf women do the courting. Werewolf men are courted.

Two Intros (they're really short):

  • The tribe finds you

  • The tribe finds you as a baby, so the chieftess adopts you. Timeskip to when you're an adult.

I had a worse version (and by that I mean more limited) back on CAI, which iirc I put a total of like 15k messages in. I've been playing with this bot in private since mid-December when I made it, but I figured I'd clean it up and make it public incase anyone else has an affinity for this kind of thing.
creator: Valendyne
